headline: Nuclear Start-Up X-Energy Is About to Go Public. Amazon Is an Investor.
summary: The company is set up for success: strong partnerships, a financing deal with the government, and a stand-out chief executive.

headline: Dow (DOW) Price Target Elevated to $47 at RBC Capital
summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) is one of the 10 High Growth Chemical Stocks to Buy. On April 10, 2026, RBC Capital raised the price target on Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) from $40 to $47. The firm’s analyst Arun Viswanathan maintained an Outperform rating on the company’s stock. RBC Capital made the adjustment as part of its broader […]

headline: Earnings Preview: Stepan Co. (SCL) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Dow, Raises Price Target to $41
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Vincent Andrews   maintains Dow (NYSE:DOW) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $27 to $41.

headline: After Fifteen Years, Tim Cook Steps Down, Wall Street Steps Back, Oil Steps Up
summary: When the session ended Monday and the Iran headlines had finally cycled through their daily contradictions, Apple dropped the one piece of news that nobody had circled on their calendar: Tim Cook is stepping down as CEO.
